nasb.text: Until the cool of the day When the shadows flee away, I will go my way to the mountain of myrrh And to the hill of frankincense.

esv.text: Until the day breathes and the shadows flee, I will go away to the mountain of myrrh and the hill of frankincense.

cnv.text: 等到晚風徐來， 日影消逝的時候， 我要親自到沒藥山， 要往乳香岡去。

ccb.text: 我要登上没药山和乳香冈， 直到晚风吹起、日影消逝。
